goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should have 'a star of 0'.
The hotel should be in the 'north'.
Make sure you get 'price range' and 'whether they have internet'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'ely'.
The train should leave on 'monday' and should 'leave after 13:45'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'train ID', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should have a star of 0
The hotel should be in the north
Make sure you get price range and whether they have internet
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to ely
The train should leave on monday and should leave after 13:45
Make sure you get travel time, train ID, and price
